text:
Baby… I just want you to know I’m grateful for you.
You make my life softer, happier, and brighter just by being in it. ❤️

Mimi, I love the way you exist in my world.
Even on normal days, you make everything feel special. 🥺💕

Baby, you’re my comfort.
When I think about peace… I think about you. Always.

Mimi… I don’t say it enough, but I’m proud of you.
For your heart, your strength, and the way you keep going.

Baby, I love your smile more than you know.
It’s honestly one of my favorite things in the whole world hehe. (I really like your parking too)

Mimi, I love how you make me feel safe to be myself.
With you, I don’t have to pretend. I can just be me. 💞

Baby… I love how we play games together and enjoy so much.
Some of my most enjoyable moemnts have just been on the game with you
(Split Fiction, It Takes Two and Last of Us 2 were some of my best
moments ever playing games)

Mimi, I love the little moments with you.
The random laughs, the small talks, the quiet time… it all means everything... even your smelly poopoo fafart 🥰

Baby, if I could pause time anywhere,
it would be in the moments where you’re close to me. ❤️

Mimi… you’re beautiful in a way that goes deeper than looks.
Your heart is what makes you unforgettable I hope you know that.

Baby, I choose you.
Not once… not sometimes… I choose you every day. 💍💕

Mimi, thank you for loving me the way you do.
You’ve made me feel loved in ways I didn’t even know I needed.

Baby… tomorrow is almost here.
And I just want you to remember: you are my favorite person, my love.
